coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 7:48 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 7:48 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 7:48 at 75%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting threshold work. 100% for 8:00. This should hurt just enough.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 100% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First block. This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting: 100% for 8:00. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 33% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 33% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 44% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 18 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 20 minutes in. 100% at 82-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 44% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 44% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 44% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 61% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 28 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 8:00 at 100%. Then 5min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 8:00 at 100%. Then 5min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 5min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 5min to contemplate your life choices. 100% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 100% × 8:00. Give it everything. 5min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 41 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 24min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 41 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 88% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
